title: ruta graveolens var. corsica
intro: Ruta graveolens var. corsica, also known as Corsican Rue or Rue, is a lesser-known variety of the Ruta graveolens plant, which is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Ruta graveolens var. corsica include its ability to act as a natural antiseptic, and its potential to support the immune system and reduce stress. Ruta graveolens var. corsica can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or oil, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions such as acne and eczema.
